issues: Punctuation (periods) is incorrectly included in the underlined text of links, specifically in 'install Bazel.' and 'command line.'
Link styling is inconsistent across the page; some links are underlined, while others (like 'languages', 'Starlark', and 'hermetically') are only indicated by green text.
The 'On this page' table of contents sidebar has an inconsistent dash bullet for the nested 'Action graph' item, while parent items have no bullets.

There is a heading hierarchy inconsistency: the 'Action graph' heading in the main body is visually identical in size and weight to top-level headings like 'Bazel build process', despite being nested in the table of contents.
All illustrative graphics and diagrams that defined the original page's visual identity are missing.
Entire sections from the original page, such as 'FAQ' and 'Build system basics', are missing from the new version of the page.
